name: 14 引力场（轨道/能量）
subject: physics
domain_name: A2 · 力学进阶与场 Advanced Mechanics & Fields (Topics 13-18)
curriculum_points: 1 understand that an electric current is a flow of charge carriers
2 understand that the charge on charge carriers is quantised
4 use, for a current-carrying conductor, the expression I = Anvq, where n is the number density of charge carriers
